plugins.name: octo
plugins.description: v9.16.0 - Skill enhancements: canary monitoring, security auto-escalation, design shotgun, ship pipeline, scope drift detection, terminal UX standardization. Research, build, review, and ship with consensus gates. 32 personas, 47 commands, 50 skills. Run /octo:setup.
